name: Hooke's law spring force
task: Create /tmp/eval_hooke/hooke.py with spring_force(k, x) returning F = -k * x (the restoring force; negative when x > 0).

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_hooke/hooke.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); F = mod.spring_force; assert F(100, 0.1) == -10; assert F(50, 0) == 0; assert F(10, -2) == 20; print('OK')
